payload.reason: Hook resolver mapped to post-<op>; renamed to bare op-type to match docs and the existing .act/hooks/close gate. hookTimeout bumped 5s→120s (the gate runs a test suite, original 5s was sized for quick lints). Verified end-to-end: close hook now fires and blocks closes when gofmt/vet/tests fail. Also gofmt-cleaned close.go + config.go to unblock CI (drift caught the previously-no-op hook would have stopped at landing time).
